creator: contact@emersion.fr
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #1)

To add on to this a bit with my wlroots maintainer hat on: thanks a lot Jan for pushing for these updates. We really appreciate the effort, it allows us to implement cutting-edge features *and* ensure we don't break our downstream FreeBSD users.

We also understand FreeBSD is an open-source project run by volunteers, and don't mind if upgrades are taking a few.
